title: ASR model profile management
created_from: User request to support different local ASR models for lower or higher hardware configurations

follow_ups.title: User-facing model selection UI
follow_ups.reason: The profile layer should work before adding a full app settings surface.

follow_ups.title: Automated hardware benchmark for model recommendation
follow_ups.reason: Static RAM and disk thresholds may be too coarse for choosing between local ASR models.

follow_ups.title: Local model acquisition and cache manager
follow_ups.reason: Model download, verification, and cleanup should remain explicit and local-only, but this contract does not implement a full installer.
